differentials.name: HCC (mass effect on liver contour and adjacent blood vessels
differentials.raw: HCC (mass effect on liver contour and adjacent blood vessels

context: isoattenuating / minimally hypoattenuating on arterial phase + delayed enhancement | delayed contrast enhancement ← pooling of contrast material within edema / nonarterial | low SI on T1WI + mildly high SI on T2WI ← edema and numerous vascular spaces | hypointensity during hepatobiliary phase (70%)
